deploymentFrequency.calculation: Count successful production deployments per day over the selected period

leadTimeForChanges.sourceOfTruth: GitHub pull request merge timestamp to Spinnaker production completion
leadTimeForChanges.calculation: Median elapsed time from PR merge to first production deployment containing the change

changeFailureRate.sourceOfTruth: Spinnaker production deployments with rollback, incident, or failed verification markers
changeFailureRate.calculation: Failed production deployments divided by total production deployments

failedDeploymentRecoveryTime.sourceOfTruth: Spinnaker rollback and remediation deployment events
failedDeploymentRecoveryTime.calculation: Median elapsed time from failed deployment detection to recovered production state

kpis.label: Lead time for changes
kpis.description: Median PR merge to production time

kpis.label: Change failure rate
kpis.description: Production deploys requiring rollback or remediation

kpis.label: Failed deployment recovery time
kpis.description: Median time from failure detection to recovery
